has_readme_and_routes.q: Have you read README + enumerated primary routes?

has_evidence_backed_value_prop.q: Can you state one-liner + audience with file/quote evidence?

has_icp_specificity.q: Is ICP a named role + company stage + trigger (not 'early adopters')?

has_competitive_wedge.q: Are 2+ competitors named with a single differentiated axis?

has_pricing_signal.q: Is pricing model or tier structure documented or flagged as gap?
